diagnoses.name: Hypertensive chronic kidney disease with stage 5 CKD
diagnoses.evidence_span: complicated by hypertensive chronic kidney disease with stage 5 CKD

diagnoses.name: End stage renal disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: He has end stage renal disease requiring hemodialysis

diagnoses.name: Alcoholic cirrhosis
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient also carries a significant hepatic history, including alcoholic cirrhosis of the liver

diagnoses.name: Alcoholic hepatitis
diagnoses.evidence_span: and concurrent alcoholic hepatitis, both currently without ascites

diagnoses.name: Hepatorenal syndrome
diagnoses.evidence_span: Most concerning during this hospitalization was the development of hepatorenal syndrome, which contributed substantially to his acute clinical deterioration.

diagnoses.name: Hepatic encephalopathy
diagnoses.evidence_span: Lactulose and rifaxomin were initiated for presumed hepatic encephalopathy

diagnoses.name: Anemia of chronic kidney disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: Anemia secondary to chronic kidney disease

procedures.name: Hemodialysis
procedures.evidence_span: The patient received emergent hemodialysis on hospital day one with partial resolution of uremic symptoms and electrolyte abnormalities.

procedures.name: Blood cultures
procedures.evidence_span: infectious workup including blood cultures and ascitic fluid analysis

procedures.name: Paracentesis
procedures.evidence_span: ascitic fluid analysis (paracentesis deferred given absence of clinical ascites)

medications.name: Lactulose
medications.evidence_span: Lactulose and rifaxomin were initiated for presumed hepatic encephalopathy

medications.name: Rifaxomin
medications.evidence_span: Lactulose and rifaxomin were initiated for presumed hepatic encephalopathy

chief_complaint: Altered mental status and acute decompensation.
